title: leptopus colchicus
side_effects: Leptopus colchicus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe issues, such as kidney damage and liver failure. In some cases, improper use of the plant can also cause allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Additionally, Leptopus colchicus can interact with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions and potentially causing life-threatening complications.
